{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grazer
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Grazer]] has been inside [[Yerin]]'s head and felt her insecurities and fears.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
